info.title: Dynamismal
info.author: Big Stack of Hay
info.description: Not your average platformer. Dynamismal is a challenging platformer with dynamic physics.
info.details: This is not your average platformer.\nThe player is driven by dynamic physics, creating a unique challenge where you must carefully manage momentum and rotation. If that wasn't enough of a challenge, the levels also contain dynamic elements with seesaws, dominoes, seesaw dominoes and catapults. There are even obstacles that will kill on contact (pink) and super-elastic bouncy ones (purple).
